question: Q-r3-walk-regime-density-dial
conjecture: On a large, bridge-sparse PhantomWiki universe (5057 articles, friendship-k 1), strict max-product K<=2 walking beats flat cosine on hard-hop (difficulty >= 6) best-trace recall@10 by more than the 0.01 noise band with a positive bootstrap95 lower bound, and the advantage responds monotonically to bridge density (sparse fk1 delta > dense fk9 delta).

abandon_signal_disclosure.server_reason: 연속 비진보 3 >= 3 (branch leaf T3-score-digest-null, consecutive_nonprogressive 3, prediction_hits 0)
abandon_signal_disclosure.justification: R3 is not another attempt on the same substrate — it is the designated regime swap the signal implies (PROM-8 C4: every prior walking trial ran on dense/small pools, i.e. flat-favouring conditions). The heuristic changes, not the protective belt.
abandon_signal_disclosure.commitment: If R3 also lands non-progressive at the programme level, the walking lane is abandoned per the signal and the programme reallocates to the federated/field lane (B2 line). This commitment is recorded before measurement.

already_public_before_registration.note: Ingest smoke was run before registration and observed structural counts only: facts_bound/unbound (0 unbound on all inspected universes), person_arcs (sparse 25606 / dense 66076 / small 348), and gold set sizes. No recall, delta, ranking, or arm outcome was computed or inspected.
already_public_before_registration.prior_context: PROM-8 C4 published the walking-win conditions; C8 recorded that no prior work dials bridge density as an independent variable.

kill_conditions: sparse hard-hop delta <= 0.01 or bootstrap95 lower <= 0 -> walking does not win even in its own best regime; walking lane abandoned per the abandon signal.
density monotonicity <= 0 -> the density dial does not govern the advantage; the C4 regime story is refuted as stated.
facts_unbound > 0 on any universe -> ingest fidelity broken, measurement void.
Any LLM/network call or gold consumption during graph construction -> void.

scope_boundary.corpus: synthetic PhantomWiki only; real-prose transfer is not claimed
scope_boundary.metric: retrieval-side best-trace recall@10; no answer-accuracy claim
scope_boundary.walker: strict T3 walker with mu-additive scoring, not the frozen kernel arithmetic
